ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recruitment_data" (
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment data point */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the recruitment data belongs to */,
  "recruitment_count" INTEGER /* Number of recruits */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interval the recruitment data belongs to */,
  "deviation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deviation the recruitment data belongs to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the recruitment data (e.g., survey, administrative data) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the recruitment data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the recruitment data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the recruitment data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_data_deviation_id FOREIGN KEY ("deviation_id") REFERENCES deviations ("deviation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_data_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the interval */,
  "interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the interval */,
  "interval_type" TEXT /* Type of interval (e.g., confidence interval, prediction interval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deviations" (
  "deviation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deviation */,
  "deviation" REAL /* Deviation from the expected value */,
  "deviation_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the deviation interval */,
  "deviation_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the deviation interval */,
  "deviation_type" TEXT /* Type of deviation (e.g., standard deviation, variance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deviation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruitment data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recruitment_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruitment_id") REFERENCES recruitment_data ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruitment data being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., data, analysis) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_recruitment_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruitment_id") REFERENCES recruitment_data ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_approval" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request being approved */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the approver */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the approval was made */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the approver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_approval_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_approval_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, statistical) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the feedback is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., pending, addressed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datatables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datatables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datatables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datatable */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the datatable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the datatable */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the datatable was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the datatable was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)
